product_summary: ProductOS V2 is structurally broad and now needs integration, validation, and PM-facing terminology cleanup before release-candidate readiness can be declared.
open_risks: Queue terminology drift may confuse PM users
Validation was added after parallel thread output and still needs execution
open_blockers: Release metadata should not be updated until validation passes
recent_customer_feedback: Product managers prefer standard PM terms over internal system labels
current_decisions_needed: Approve release-candidate cutover after validation results are green
recommended_next_steps: Update release metadata and adoption records
